summary: Frontend-only testing of Luks Solutions Ltd landing page on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x800). All sections render, all required data-testid selectors exist, interactive flows (nav, CTA scroll, testimonial carousel, contact form static submit, mobile menu toggle, header scroll glass) work correctly.

test_results.header_and_nav_links: PASS - header-nav, all 5 nav-link-* testids, nav-cta-contact present
test_results.hero_headline_and_ctas: PASS - exact headline 'Build the future with Expert IT Consulting' rendered with gradient span; hero-cta-explore scrolls to #services (verified in-view); hero-cta-learn present
test_results.portfolio_bento: PASS - 3 portfolio-item cards with images and metrics
test_results.team_about: PASS - 2013 established badge, 4 about-fact-* cards (Engineers, Countries, Engagements, ISO 27001)
test_results.testimonials_carousel: PASS - prev/next buttons cycle (next changes content, prev returns to original); dot indicators reflect active state
test_results.contact_form_static: PASS - all inputs filled; submit toggles button text to 'Message received' (no backend call)
test_results.footer: PASS - 17 footer-link elements across Services/Company/Resources + legal; social icons; giant LUKS wordmark visible
test_results.header_scroll_state: PASS - bg-transparent at top, backdrop-blur glass appears after scroll>24px
test_results.mobile_menu_toggle: PASS - clicking mobile-menu-toggle at 375x800 opens menu showing all 5 nav links and Get Started CTA (visually verified in screenshot)

critical_code_review_comments: Multiple footer links share the same data-testid='footer-link' (17 duplicates) - acceptable per request spec but consider unique testids (e.g. footer-link-privacy) for stricter selection.
Hero hidden <br className='hidden sm:block' /> between 'future' and 'with' produces text 'Build the future with Expert IT Consulting' (matches spec).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is fully static visual. All data-testid hooks present. Contact form intentionally does not POST and is verified via button-label swap to 'Message received'. Header glass-state toggles on scroll>24px. Mobile menu correctly opens on 375x800.
